goals.short_name: British Columbians and businesses can pay provincial taxes easily and accurately

main_services.name: Register and pay provincial sales tax

goals.short_name: Property owners get fair assessments and the tax relief they qualify for

main_services.name: Reduce your annual property tax bill
Comply with the speculation and vacancy tax

goals.short_name: Financial services and the public sector operate with sound oversight and transparency

main_services.name: Access regulated financial services with confidence
Oversee public sector compensation and governance

goals.short_name: Government's budget and finances are transparent and well managed

main_services.name: Track the provincial budget and financial results

acts.summary: Imposes and administers the provincial sales tax (PST) on taxable goods, software, and services acquired in or brought into B.C., including registration, collection, and remittance obligations.

sections.title: Registration to collect tax
sections.description: Requires businesses that sell, lease, or provide taxable goods, software, or services in B.C. to register to collect and remit PST.

services.name: Register to collect PST
services.ms_name: Register and pay provincial sales tax

sections.title: Accommodation and MRDT registration
sections.description: Requires accommodation providers, including short-term rental operators, to register to collect PST and, where applicable, the Municipal and Regional District Tax.

services.name: Register to collect tax on short-term accommodation
services.ms_name: Register and pay provincial sales tax

acts.summary: Imposes property transfer tax on registered transfers of an interest in B.C. land, sets exemptions, and imposes an additional tax on residential property acquired by foreign nationals, foreign corporations, and taxable trustees in specified areas.

sections.title: Tax on registration of property transfers
sections.description: Imposes property transfer tax based on the fair market value of a property at the time of registration.

services.name: Pay property transfer tax when you buy property
services.ms_name: Pay tax on property transactions

sections.title: Exemptions
sections.description: Sets out exemptions from property transfer tax, including the first time home buyers' program, newly built home exemption, and family and farm transfers.

services.name: Claim a property transfer tax exemption
services.ms_name: Pay tax on property transactions

sections.title: Additional tax for foreign entities
sections.description: Imposes an additional property transfer tax on foreign nationals, foreign corporations, and taxable trustees acquiring residential property in specified areas of B.C.

services.name: Pay the additional property transfer tax as a foreign buyer
services.ms_name: Pay tax on property transactions

acts.full_name: Residential Property (Short-Term Holding) Profit Tax Act
acts.summary: Imposes the BC home flipping tax on profit earned from disposing of a taxable residential property, including presale contract assignments, owned for less than 730 days, effective January 1, 2025.

sections.title: Tax on profit from short-term property sales
sections.description: Imposes a tax on net taxable income from the disposition of a taxable property owned for less than 730 days, with the rate declining over the holding period.

services.name: File a BC home flipping tax return
services.ms_name: Pay tax on property transactions

acts.summary: Imposes B.C. personal and corporate income tax and establishes provincial income tax credits, administered under a collection agreement with the Government of Canada.

sections.title: Personal tax credits
sections.description: Establishes personal income tax credits, including the renter's tax credit, training credit, and climate action credit.

services.name: Claim a personal income tax credit
services.ms_name: Claim income tax credits

sections.title: Corporate tax credits
sections.description: Establishes corporate income tax credits, including scientific research and experimental development, film and television, and manufacturing and processing investment credits.

services.name: Claim a corporate income tax credit
services.ms_name: Claim income tax credits

acts.summary: Establishes the home owner grant, which reduces the annual property tax homeowners pay on their principal residence, including an additional grant for seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities.

sections.title: Home owner grant
sections.description: Sets eligibility, grant amounts, and the grant threshold for the regular and additional home owner grant.

services.name: Claim the home owner grant
services.ms_name: Reduce your annual property tax bill

acts.summary: Imposes an annual speculation and vacancy tax on residential property in designated taxable areas of B.C. based on how owners use the property, with annual declaration, exemption, credit, and payment requirements.

sections.title: Designated taxable areas
sections.description: Designates the taxable areas of B.C. where the speculation and vacancy tax applies.

services.name: Check if your property is subject to the speculation and vacancy tax
services.ms_name: Comply with the speculation and vacancy tax

sections.title: Annual declaration requirement
sections.description: Requires owners of residential property in taxable areas to declare annually by March 31.

services.name: File a speculation and vacancy tax declaration
services.ms_name: Comply with the speculation and vacancy tax

sections.title: Exemptions and tax credits
sections.description: Sets out exemptions from the tax and tax credits available to owners who do not qualify for an exemption.

services.name: Claim a speculation and vacancy tax exemption or credit
services.ms_name: Comply with the speculation and vacancy tax

sections.title: Payment of tax
sections.description: Requires payment of assessed speculation and vacancy tax by the first business day of July.

services.name: Pay the speculation and vacancy tax
services.ms_name: Comply with the speculation and vacancy tax

acts.summary: Establishes the regulatory framework for credit unions, trust companies, and insurance companies in B.C. and, with related statutes, underpins the BC Financial Services Authority's oversight of mortgage brokers, real estate professionals, and pensions.

sections.title: Regulation of financial services sector
sections.description: Defines financial institutions, financial services, and the powers of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions and BC Financial Services Authority.

services.name: Get information about a regulated mortgage broker, real estate professional, or financial institution
services.ms_name: Access regulated financial services with confidence

sections.title: Public protection and complaints
sections.description: Provides for supervision, investigation, and enforcement action against regulated entities to protect the public.

services.name: Report a concern about a regulated financial services provider
services.ms_name: Access regulated financial services with confidence

acts.summary: Establishes the Public Sector Employers' Council and requires public sector employers to disclose executive compensation annually.

sections.title: Executive compensation disclosure
sections.description: Requires organizations defined as public sector employers to disclose compensation paid to their CEO and next four highest-paid executives.

services.name: Access public sector executive compensation disclosures
services.ms_name: Oversee public sector compensation and governance

acts.summary: Requires B.C. employers to include pay information in job postings, prohibits asking applicants about pay history, protects employees from reprisal for pay discussions, and requires larger reporting employers to publish annual pay transparency reports.

sections.title: Employer reporting obligations
sections.description: Requires reporting employers to prepare and publish an annual pay transparency report by November 1 each year.

services.name: Publish a pay transparency report as an employer
services.ms_name: Comply with pay transparency requirements

acts.summary: Requires government to publish the annual Budget, quarterly financial reports, and the Public Accounts, and sets out reporting requirements for Crown corporations.

sections.title: Budget documents
sections.description: Requires the government to table an annual budget with revenue, expense, and forecast information.

services.name: Review the B.C. budget
services.ms_name: Track the provincial budget and financial results

sections.title: Public Accounts
sections.description: Requires government to publish the Public Accounts annually, comparing actual financial results to the budget plan.

services.name: Access Public Accounts and government financial statements
services.ms_name: Track the provincial budget and financial results

sections.title: Financial reporting requirements
sections.description: Sets accounting and reporting standards that government ministries and public sector organizations must follow.

acts.full_name: Balanced Budget and Ministerial Accountability Act, 2002
acts.summary: Requires a Ministerial Accountability Report comparing expected and actual performance results for members of the Executive Council to be released alongside the Public Accounts each year.

sections.title: Ministerial Accountability Report
sections.description: Requires a comparison of expected and actual performance results for members of the Executive Council to be released with the Public Accounts.

services.name: Access Public Accounts and government financial statements
services.ms_name: Track the provincial budget and financial results
